_readme: This file is the expected response contract for POST /generate-script. It documents exactly what the frontend Content Strategy Panel needs from the 'seo' object. Each tab in the panel maps to a specific section below.
title: Stop Guessing How to Live: Why Philosophy is Your Hidden Operating System
synopsis: A two-sentence summary of the video used as fallback for description hook and body if seo.description_template is absent.

seo._tab1_title_workshop: Exactly 4 items required. Frontend shows one card per type. 'selected: true' marks the recommended pick (shown with a ✓ badge). Types must be exactly: curiosity_gap, data_led, how_to, narrative.

recommended_titles.title: Stop Guessing How to Live: Why Philosophy is Your Hidden Operating System
recommended_titles.desc: Self-recognition hook creates cognitive dissonance. Signals exclusive information — strong CTR on discovery feeds.

recommended_titles.title: The Research Behind Philosophy as a Decision-Making Framework
recommended_titles.desc: Statistic-first builds instant credibility. Appeals to evidence-seeking viewers who have already noticed the problem.

recommended_titles.title: Unlock Your Hidden Operating System with Philosophy
recommended_titles.desc: Mechanism + solution promise in one frame. Captures viewers actively seeking answers, not just understanding.

recommended_titles.title: A Deep Dive Into Philosophy as a Life Operating System
recommended_titles.desc: 'Deep dive' signals premium content depth — correlates with strong watch-time retention on long-form viewers.

seo._tab2_keyword_strategy: Each array powers one keyword card. primary: 2 items (shown as bold chips). secondary: 3 items (shown as grey tags). longtail: 4 items (list rows). question_based: 4 items (blue question rows). Empty arrays cause the frontend to fall back to auto-generated placeholders.

question_based: is philosophy useful in real life?
why do philosophers make better decisions?
what is a mental operating system?

seo._tab3_thumbnail_concepts: Array of exactly 2 thumbnail concept objects. Frontend renders each as a side-by-side card with a preview image, type badge, style badge, headline, text_overlay box, description, and face_recommended tag. type must be: curiosity_gap | data_driven. style must be: warm | cool.

thumbnail_brief.headline: Shocked expression + bold text overlay
thumbnail_brief.description: Face + emotional text creates immediate empathy. Warm palette mirrors topic energy — shock vs calm headline tension drives clicks.

thumbnail_brief.headline: Bold quote on dark minimal background
thumbnail_brief.description: Statement-first framing signals credibility and stops the scroll. Cool palette reads analytical — separates from oversaturated thumbnails.

seo._tab4_description_builder: Three fields power the three description cards. hook: 1-2 sentences with the primary keyword in the first 10 words — rendered with keyword highlighted in amber. body_bullets: 3-5 short bullet strings shown as → items. outro: CTA paragraph shown verbatim in the Outro card.

description_template.hook: Philosophy is the hidden operating system running your decisions — most people never install it consciously.
body_bullets: Discover how ancient philosophical frameworks apply directly to modern daily decisions.
Learn the three core principles stoic philosophers used to eliminate mental noise.
See how reframing your mental model leads to measurable improvements in focus and clarity.
Understand why top performers study philosophy — and the simple habit to start today.
Get a step-by-step framework for building your own life operating system.
description_template.outro: If this changed how you see philosophy, subscribe for more research-backed breakdowns every week. Drop your biggest takeaway in the comments — I read every one.

seo._tab5_hashtag_strategy: Array of hashtag objects. strategy must be either 'established' (shown in grey Established card) or 'expansion' (shown in green Expansion card). Include at least 3 of each. hashtag string must include the # prefix.
seo._metadata: These fields are not rendered in a dedicated tab but may be used for header/metadata display and chapter structure in the Script Structure sidebar.
seo.justification: The title satisfies curiosity about philosophy as a life framework while signalling educational depth. Concise and recall-friendly.
seo.angle: Stop Guessing How to Live: Why Philosophy is Your Hidden Operating System (And How to Use It)
key_questions_to_answer: What is a mental operating system?
How did ancient philosophers make decisions?
Can stoicism be applied to modern productivity?
